layman_headline: Fear grips the crypto market — patience beats impulse right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in a fearful state with most coins showing bearish chart structures. While a few coins like TRUMP and BONK are technically oversold, their charts are ugly with strong downward momentum. Ethereum looks like the safest opportunity if it pulls back to stronger support around $1,800, but even it hasn't given a clean buy signal yet. The smart move is to wait for better setups rather than force a trade into weakness.
layman_action: Keep your cash on the sidelines for now. Set alerts for ETH near $1,800 and watch if the Fear & Greed index continues improving toward 35+, which could signal the start of a real recovery. Don't chase anything today.
expert_reasoning: Every swing candidate shows problematic setups. BONK has a -2.0 chart bias with Three Black Crows — a classic capitulation pattern to avoid catching. TRUMP's RSI at 22 is deeply oversold (historically our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but the bearish chart structure and lack of volume/catalyst make it a knife-catch. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but RSI at 59 and +51.7% 5-day momentum scream 'already extended.' ETH is the highest-quality asset approaching oversold territory with a clear support at $1,800, but its chart bias is -0.70 with price below all MAs. The proper play is to wait for ETH to test $1,800 support with a bullish reversal candle before entering. High BTC dominance at 56.5% continues to punish altcoins, making this a poor environment for speculative alt entries.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.5% and rising could continue crushing altcoin performance for weeks
Fear & Greed at 29 is improving but hasn't crossed the 35+ threshold that typically precedes sustained recoveries
No clear MACD bullish crosses or volume breakout confirmations on any candidate — all setups lack conviction
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a bounce with volume would trigger a BUY signal
Fear & Greed index crossing above 35 as confirmation of sentiment shift
TRUMP RSI staying below 25 — if it holds at $1.50 support and RSI starts curling up, that becomes a high-conviction oversold bounce play
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear phase with BTC at $64.4K holding relatively well while altcoins bleed. BTC dominance at 56.5% signals capital rotation into Bitcoin and away from alts, making this a hostile environment for swing trades on smaller coins.
context_banner: Market fear is improving from extreme levels but hasn't confirmed a reversal — discipline means waiting for clean setups rather than buying into bearish chart structures.

key_signals.description: TRUMP RSI at 22 is deeply oversold (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but bearish chart structure (-0.70) prevents entry — waiting for chart confirmation.
Fear & Greed at 29 trending up from 26 weekly average suggests improving sentiment, but hasn't crossed the 35 threshold needed for conviction entries.
ETH derivatives reset article suggests positioning is getting cleaned out, which historically precedes price recoveries — adds to ETH watchlist priority.

LDO shows Three White Soldiers (+0.85 bias) but +51.7% in 5 days means the move is already extended with poor risk/reward (0.38x). BONK shows Three Black Crows (-2.0 bias) confirming capitulation still in progress.
CLARITY Act progress and Bitcoin's new $80K target narrative could shift sentiment if BTC breaks higher, which would eventually benefit alts — monitoring closely.
